org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base

Class ErsapQueries.CanonicalNameQuery<T>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.jlab.epsci.ersap.base.ErsapQueries.CanonicalNameQuery<T>
  • Type Parameters:
    T - The name class of the components
    Enclosing class:
    ErsapQueries

    public static class ErsapQueries.CanonicalNameQuery<T>
extends java.lang.Object
    A query to get the names of the registered ERSAP components.

      • syncRun

        public T syncRun(long wait,
                 java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit unit)
          throws ErsapException,
                 java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException
        Sends the query and waits for a response.
        Parameters:
        wait - the amount of time units to wait for a response
        unit - the unit of time
        Returns:
        the result of the query
        Throws:
        ErsapException - if the query could not be sent or received
        java.util.concurrent.TimeoutException - if the response is not received

        protected D self()
